messages.content: Hello! Welcome to AXE Finance. I'm your AI loan assistant. How can I help you today?
HELLO i need a loan
Welcome to AXE Finance! I'm your loan application assistant. I'll guide you through a quick application. Is this loan for personal or business use?
personal
Understood. What's your full name?
Nour omri
Great, I have that. What's your national ID number? (8 digits)
Perfect, noted. What's your email address? (e.g., your.name@example.com)
nouromry@gmail.com
Understood. What's your phone number? (8 digits, e.g., 98765432)
Great, I have that. How much would you like to borrow? (in TND)
Perfect, noted. What will you use this loan for?
buy a car i think
Hello there! It seems like you're considering getting a car loan. To help us determine the best options for you, could you please share your monthly income in Tunisian Dinar (TND)?

Congratulations on completing your application! To finalize your loan process, please upload your financial documents, including an income statement, bank statements (3-6 months), and a balance sheet for your business. I have all your information now.
tell me about the interst rate here
The interest rates at AXE Finance range from 8% to 16%, depending on the level of risk associated with your loan application. I have all your information!
Do I need a guarantor?

For personal loans at AXE Finance, a guarantor is typically not required as they are usually unsecured. However, if you're applying for a business loan, there might be a possibility of requiring collateral and potentially a guarantor. I have all your information!
What is the minimum loan term?
The minimum loan term at AXE Finance is 12 months. I have all your information!
for a personal loan what documents i have to upload
For a personal loan, you need to upload National ID card, proof of income (3 months salary slips), bank statements (3 months), and proof of address. I have all your information!
bye
application state

Congratulations! Your loan application is now complete. To finalize the process, please upload your financial documents (income statement, bank statements for the past 3-6 months, and a balance sheet if you're a business owner). I have all your information!

response: Congratulations! Your loan application is now complete. To finalize the process, please upload your financial documents (income statement, bank statements for the past 3-6 months, and a balance sheet if you're a business owner). I have all your information!
name: Nour Omri
